com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Interface IProjectManager


  • public interface IProjectManager
    Since:
    TTworkbench 20

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void deleteProject(java.lang.String projectName)
      Deletes a project from the server workspace.
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> listProjects()
      List the server workspace projects
      java.lang.String publishProject(java.io.File location, int flags)
      Deprecated. 
      use publishProject(String, File, int)
      java.lang.String publishProject(java.lang.String desiredName, java.io.File location, int flags)
      Publishes a project to the server workspace.

    • Method Detail

      • publishProject

        java.lang.String publishProject(java.lang.String desiredName,
                                java.io.File location,
                                int flags)
                         throws java.io.IOException

        Publishes a project to the server workspace.

        Parameters:
        desiredName - desired project name on the server
        location - source project location (directory or zip file)
        flags - load flags as defined by IExecutionBase.AVOID_NAME_CLASH, IExecutionBase.OVERRIDE and IExecutionBase.SYNC
        Returns:
        The name of the imported project.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the project cannot be loaded, executor requirements are not met or network error occurred

      • deleteProject

        void deleteProject(java.lang.String projectName)
            throws java.io.IOException

        Deletes a project from the server workspace.

        Parameters:
        projectName - project to delete
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the project cannot be deleted

      • listProjects

        java.util.List<java.lang.String> listProjects()
                                       throws java.io.IOException
        List the server workspace projects
        Returns:
        list of project names
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • publishProject

        @Deprecated
java.lang.String publishProject(java.io.File location,
                                            int flags)
                                     throws java.io.IOException
        Deprecated. use publishProject(String, File, int)
        Equivalent with calling publishProject(location.getName(), location, flags).
        Parameters:
        location - source project location
        flags - load flags as defined by IExecutionBase.AVOID_NAME_CLASH, IExecutionBase.OVERRIDE and IExecutionBase.SYNC
        Returns:
        The name of the imported project.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the project cannot be loaded, executor requirements are not met or network error occurred
